channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Petrol and diesel prices rise again in Bengaluru after fourth increase in 10 days
item.description: Fuel prices in Bengaluru have seen a sharp and continuous rise, with petrol crossing the ₹110 per litre mark following the fourth increase in just 10 days. According to the latest revision, petrol pri...

item.title: Security overhaul ordered for President Ruto after breach during Kilifi public event
item.description: A major security review and overhaul has been ordered following a breach involving President William Ruto during a public event in Ganze, Kilifi County. The incident occurred during a thanksgiving cer...

item.title: How AI is transforming online shopping and reshaping how brands reach consumers
item.description: The article explores how artificial intelligence is reshaping the modern shopping experience, making it significantly faster, more seamless, and more personalised. According to Google Canada’s head of...

item.title: Anglican Communion tensions deepen over election of first female Archbishop of Canterbury
item.description: Barney Mthombothi reflects on the growing internal conflict within the worldwide Anglican Communion following the election of Sarah Mullally as the first woman Archbishop of Canterbury. The article ex...

item.title: Pandor home robbery reignites concerns over violent crime and public safety in South Africa
item.description: The robbery at the Pretoria home of former international relations minister Naledi Pandor has renewed public concern about violent crime and safety in South Africa. According to the article, Pandor an...

item.title: Family Struggles Over Whether Alcoholic Son Should Attend Grandfather’s Funeral
item.description: This advice column by R. Eric Thomas discusses a difficult family conflict that emerged after the death of a man who had suffered from dementia for many years. The deceased man’s daughter is strugglin...

item.title: Federal Government plans dedicated radio station for adult and non-formal education nationwide
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria has announced plans to launch a dedicated radio station aimed at improving adult and non-formal education across the country. According to Dr John Edeh, Director of L...

item.title: Senate minority bloc lacks enough members to push leadership change
item.description: The ABS-CBN News report discussed the current situation inside the Philippine Senate, where the minority bloc reportedly still has only 11 members and remains short of the numbers needed to initiate a...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif holds high-level talks with Chinese Premier Li Qiang in Beijing during official visit
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met his Chinese counterpart Li Qiang in Beijing during his official four-day visit to China, marking an important engagement aimed at strengthening bilateral relations. T...

item.title: Nameless addresses viral AI-generated images and defends his signature style and privacy
item.description: Kenyan musician Nameless, whose real name is David Mathenge, has responded to online discussions sparked by AI-generated images showing him without his signature cap, sunglasses, and durag. The images...

item.title: A Look at Irene Dunne’s Hollywood Career and Glamorous 1930s Photographs
item.description: This article from Vintage Everyday highlights the life, career, and enduring legacy of actress Irene Dunne through a collection of glamorous photographs from the 1930s. Born Irene Marie Dunn in 1898, ...

item.title: A Look Back at Silvana Pampanini’s Influence on Post-War Italian Cinema
item.description: Silvana Pampanini (1925–2016) was one of the most recognizable actresses of post-war Italian cinema and became an international symbol of glamour during the 1950s. Her rise to fame began after the 194...

item.title: Barry Manilow reflects on life, career, health and identity at 82
item.description: Barry Manilow, the 82-year-old American singer and performer, discusses his life and career in a wide-ranging interview following recent health challenges and continued touring plans. Earlier in the y...

item.title: Brad Pitt, Cher, Madonna and Other Celebrities Discussed for High-Profile Age-Gap Relationships
item.description: The article examines several celebrity couples with significant age differences, focusing on Hollywood stars and musicians who are in relationships with much younger partners. It begins with actor Bra...

item.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu posts weakest Star Wars box office opening in Disney era
item.description: The film The Mandalorian and Grogu has debuted at the box office with the lowest opening weekend of any Star Wars film released under Disney’s ownership of the franchise. Despite topping the global bo...

item.title: Rare 1987 LIFE Magazine Photoshoot Showcases Alyssa Milano at the Height of Her Teen Stardom
item.description: A recently highlighted collection of photographs revisits actress Alyssa Milano during a 1987 photoshoot for LIFE magazine, capturing the young television star at the peak of her popularity in the lat...

item.title: French Painter Jean Geoffroy’s Realistic Depictions of Childhood and Public Education
item.description: The article highlights the life and artistic legacy of French painter and illustrator Jean Geoffroy (1853–1924), also known by the pseudonym Geo. Geoffroy became widely recognized during the French Th...

item.title: Rep. Ro Khanna Criticizes Vice President JD Vance Over Defense of Trump Administration Funding and Policies
item.description: Representative Ro Khanna, a Democrat from California, sharply criticized Vice President JD Vance during an appearance on NBC’s “Meet the Press,” focusing on Vance’s defense of President Donald Trump’s...

item.title: APC Endorses Tinubu for 2027 as Debate Grows Over Credibility of Primary Vote Figures
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don secure overwhelming victory for the All Progressives Congress (APC) presidential primary ahead of the 2027 general election after polling 10,999,162 votes, while his only cha...

item.title: Former AFL player and coach Neale Daniher dies after long battle with motor neurone disease
item.description: Former AFL player, coach and celebrated fundraiser Neale Daniher has died in Melbourne at the age of 65 after a decade-long battle with motor neurone disease (MND). Diagnosed in 2013, Daniher made his...
